1. Mini Camera: Capturing clear images with 1080P video recording and 1MP photos. Perfect for daily recording and creative works.

3. Creative Filters and LED Light: Supports multiple color filters and loop recording. Equipped with an LED fill light for night filming, meeting various creative needs.

1. Press and hold the power button for 3 seconds to turn on or off the device.

5. In the camera mode, short press the up button to switch to video mode, then short press again to enter video playback mode.
